Inference latency incident update

Incident updates are useful when they explain which mitigation steps restored service, how traffic was shifted away from the failing path, and what operators should keep monitoring before declaring a system stable again.

Strong updates also tell customers what degraded behavior remains, which rollback path is still active, and when the next status checkpoint will be published.

Affected components
Inference API, Batch API
Status update banner
Subscribe to updates
Incident timeline
